metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4671
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig. 5: Endogenous Exo70 is associated to synapse junctions. The brains from 12 weeks-old rats were fractionated by differential centrifugation. Exo70 is present in ELKS2-positive, Synaptohysin-negative PSD fraction.

Fig. 6: Endogenous Exo70 is found in both pre- and postsynaptic compartments: Rat hippocampal neurons were fixed at DIV 21 and immuno-stained for Exo70. Co-localization was observed with SHANK2 (post) and Bassoon (pre). No quantification. Exo70 puncta were also present without Shank2 or Bassoon colocalization. Experimental description: M&M: hippocampi were dissected from embryonic Sprague-Dawley rats (E18). Neurons were dissociated with trypsin and plated

antibody;
rabbit Exo70 1:1000 (Proteintech, USA)
